from pathlib import Path


def collect_output_files(base_dir, filenames):
    results = []
    for name in filenames:
        path = Path(base_dir) / "output" / name
        results.append(str(path))
    return results


def build_asset_paths(project_root, assets):
    paths = []
    for asset in assets:
        full = Path(project_root) / "static" / "assets" / asset
        paths.append(full)
    return paths


def generate_report_paths(base, report_names):
    reports = []
    for name in report_names:
        report_path = Path(base) / "reports" / "2024" / f"{name}.pdf"
        reports.append(report_path)
    return reports
